articles.title: Chhattisgarh cabinet halves land registration fees for women to promote economic empowerment
articles.description: Chhattisgarh cabinet halves land registration fees for women to promote economic empowerment

topStories.title: Courts can't sit in judgement in matters of religious belief of denomination: TDB tells Supreme Court
topStories.description: A nine-judge Constitution Bench headed by Chief Justice Surya Kant was told by the TDB that the beliefs and practices of the community have to be judged by the subjective belief of the community and the court is bound to accept their belief

topStories.title: 'They're beaten up pretty badly' — Trump says peace deal with Iran 'very possible’ by end of April: Report
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump has recently hinted that a deal with Iran is ‘very possible’ by the end of the month, when King Charles III is scheduled to visit the US. Trump also criticised the UK over its stance on the Iran war.

topStories.title: Trump warns that UK trade deal 'can always be changed'
topStories.description: The US president says he gave the UK a "better" deal than he had to in an interview on Wednesday.

topStories.title: What you need to know about Israel’s ambassador to the US
topStories.description: Israel’s ambassador held talks with his Lebanese counterpart. But critics say Yechiel Leiter is a problematic negotiator

topStories.title: More than 200 Iranian sailors stranded after US torpedo attack return home
topStories.description: The survivors of the US attack on Iranian vessel Iris Dena, which claimed the lives of 104 people, were among those repatriated.

topStories.title: Spotify launches the ability to purchase physical books in the US and UK
topStories.description: Spotify users in the US and UK can officially purchase physical books through the Android app. iOS users will get the feature next week.

topStories.title: Congress chief Kharge convenes meeting of party brass over women’s quota, delimitation
topStories.description: The Congress has alleged that when the intent behind the Bill is "mischievous" and its content "devious", the extent of damage to parliamentary democracy is enormous

topStories.title: CJI Surya Kant hails achievements of outgoing Supreme Court judge Rajesh Bindal
topStories.description: Justice Bindal was elevated to the top court on February 13, 2023, and demitting office on April 15, 2026, with over three year tenure in which he authored over 100 judgements

topStories.description: Roelf Meyer played a key role as a negotiator during talks to end white-minority rule in South Africa.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Blockade Risks Upending an Emerging Détente With China
dailyNews.description: In a thinly veiled critique of the war in Iran, China’s leader said the world could not risk reverting “to the law of the jungle.”

dailyNews.title: How China’s Weapons Transfers to Iran Have Evolved Over Decades
dailyNews.description: China has denied claims this month by U.S. intelligence that it might have shipped arms to Iran. In recent years, China has supported Iran with dual-use parts.

dailyNews.title: The Republicans Who Disapprove of the War, and a Wave of College Closures
dailyNews.description: Plus, will the World Cup bring tourists back to the U.S.?

dailyNews.title: Vance Says Pope Leo Should Be More Careful When Talking About Theology
dailyNews.description: The vice president, who is Catholic, took issue with Pope Leo XIV’s statement that disciples of Christ are “never on the side of those who once wielded the sword and today drop bombs.”

dailyNews.title: JD Vance Heckled In Antiwar Protest at Turning Point USA Event
dailyNews.description: Vice President JD Vance appeared to express sympathy with critics of the war with Iran: “I recognize that young voters do not love the policy we have in the Middle East, OK. I understand.”

dailyNews.title: Pope Leo’s Challenge in Cameroon: Show African Catholics How Much They Matter
dailyNews.description: Catholicism is growing fast on the continent, yet Africans play a comparatively small role in church leadership. Cameroon, which Leo XIV will visit Wednesday, shows the divide.

dailyNews.title: Prosecutors Make Surprise Visit to Fed as Pirro Defends Investigation
dailyNews.description: The Justice Department’s criminal inquiry into the Federal Reserve threatens to delay the confirmation of the next chair.

dailyNews.title: King Charles III and Queen Camilla Will Visit D.C., New York and Virginia
dailyNews.description: The planned four-day state visit comes at a fraught time in the U.S.-U.K. relationship, following President Trump’s frequent belittling of the British prime minister.

dailyNews.title: Gallego Dismissed Rumors of a ‘Flirty’ Swalwell, Highlighting a Culture of Silence
dailyNews.description: The admission by Senator Ruben Gallego that he had heard, but disbelieved, rumors about Eric Swalwell and women showed the attitude on Capitol Hill toward men accused of behaving badly.

dailyNews.title: Swalwell’s Exit Injects ‘Chaos’ Into California Governor’s Race
dailyNews.description: Democratic candidates see sudden voter interest in the sleepy contest as a campaign opportunity. All are scrambling for support from former backers of Eric Swalwell.

dailyNews.title: Resignations of Eric Swalwell and Tony Gonzales Set Up Special Election Fights in Texas and California
dailyNews.description: Gov. Gavin Newsom of California called a special election to replace Mr. Swalwell, while Gov. Greg Abbott of Texas had yet to announce one for Mr. Gonzales’s successor.

dailyNews.title: How Older Adults Are Using VR to Counter Social Isolation
dailyNews.description: New tools tailored for use in senior living communities allow for shared experiences and social bonding.

dailyNews.title: U.S. says Iran ports blockade "fully implemented" as Trump weighs more talks
dailyNews.description: CENTCOM commander Adm. Brad Cooper says a blockade of Iranian ports "has been fully implemented," as the U.S.-Iran impasse over control of the Strait of Hormuz continues amid a delicate ceasefire.

dailyNews.title: "The noose is getting tighter" on Iran amid blockade, Middle East expert says
dailyNews.description: The White House said more than 100 empty oil tankers are heading to ports in the U.S. to load up on American crude as the U.S. blockade on the Strait of Hormuz continues for a second day. For more, Jon Alterman, the director of the Center for Strategic and International Studies' Middle East Program, joins "The Daily Report" to discuss.

dailyNews.title: Trump signals new talks with Iran to start soon
dailyNews.description: President Trump said new talks with the Iranian regime could start within days. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.

dailyNews.title: Tankers, talks and Trump's 'dangerous' blockade: China's Iran war involvement gets louder
dailyNews.description: BEIJING — China has been a quiet — if crucial — player in the Iran war, as U.S. military action upends the global economy

dailyNews.title: Trump claims new Iran talks starting soon amid blockade
dailyNews.description: Trump claims new Iran talks starting soon amid blockade

dailyNews.title: Trump alienates a close European ally with pope feud
dailyNews.description: President Trump's criticism of Pope Leo, and a Truth Social post appearing to depict the president as Jesus, have caused outrage among Christians, as well as some of Trump's allies. NBC News' Claudio Lavanga reports.

dailyNews.title: Iran war 'very close to over,' Trump says — and the stock market 'is going to boom'
dailyNews.description: The U.S. has beaten Iran "militarily" and that the war is "very close to over," Trump said, claiming a peace deal likely.

dailyNews.title: United CEO had been considering a merger last fall, months before bringing it up to the Trump administration
dailyNews.description: United Airlines CEO Scott Kirby has said the next phase for U.S. carriers is figuring out how to better compete on a global stage.

dailyNews.title: Trump takes aim at Pope Leo again, days after calling him 'weak on crime'
dailyNews.description: Trump's remarks came amid a running spat between the White House and the Vatican over the U.S.-Israel war against Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.
